piv.py

Defines the datum.piv.Piv class, which encapsulates the BeVERLI Hill stereo PIV data.

class datum.piv.Piv(data=None, transformation_parameters=None)

Encapsulates the BeVERLI Hill stereo PIV data.

__init__(data=None, transformation_parameters=None)

Constructs a datum.piv.Piv object.

Parameters:

  • data (datum.my_types.PivData) – The BeVERLI Hill stereo PIV data.

  • transformation_parameters (datum.my_types.NestedDict) – The coordinate transformation parameters for transforming the BeVERLI Hill stereo PIV data from their local Cartesian PIV coordinate system to the global Cartesian coordinate system of the BeVERLI experiment in the Virginia Tech Stability Wind Tunnel.

property data

The BeVERLI Hill stereo PIV data.

Returns:

The BeVERLI Hill stereo PIV data.

Return type:

datum.my_types.PivData

property transformation_parameters

The coordinate transformation parameters for transforming the BeVERLI Hill stereo PIV data from their local Cartesian PIV coordinate system to the global Cartesian coordinate system of the BeVERLI experiment in the Virginia Tech Stability Wind Tunnel.

Returns:

The transformation parameters.

Return type:

datum.my_types.NestedDict

search(quantity)

Searches the BeVERLI Hill stereo PIV data for a specified flow quantity.

Parameters:

quantity (str) – The flow quantity to be searched.

Returns:

Boolean value indicating whether the specified quantity is contained in the BeVERLI Hill stereo PIV data or not.

Return type:

bool
